ogTitle: South West Rocks vs South Wolumla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South West Rocks and South Wolumla.
heading: South West Rocks vs South Wolumla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South West Rocks, New South Wales and South Wolumla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Wolumla has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to South West Rocks (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South West Rocks or South Wolumla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South West Rocks has a flood risk score of 38/100, while South Wolumla scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South West Rocks scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. South Wolumla scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South West Rocks or South Wolumla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Wolumla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
